## Checklist

- [ ] Entries added to `src/data/agents.json` (or regenerated via `pnpm data`)
- [ ] Every `url` resolves to public, working source (repo or runnable notebook)
- [ ] `industry` is set; `framework` is one of `CrewAI` / `AutoGen` / `Agno` / `LangGraph`, or `null`
- [ ] `pnpm build` and `pnpm lint` pass locally
